title: Thai Papaya Salad
description: A spicy and sour Thai salad made with shredded green papaya, tomatoes, and a variety of spices.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded papaya, chopped tomatoes, and sliced chilies.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, palm sugar, and lime juice.
3. Pour the dressing over the papaya mixture and toss to combine.
4. Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the top and toss again.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
7. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
8. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
